# Holtz Digital

> Buffalo web design and local SEO services for small businesses in Western New York.

Holtz Digital is a web design studio based in Buffalo, NY, run by Darrin Holtz. We build fast, custom websites for local businesses that want clearer positioning, stronger local search visibility, and more qualified leads.

## Services

- Custom website design (HTML, Next.js, WordPress, and other modern stacks)
- Website redesigns and performance optimization
- Local SEO foundations (on-page structure, metadata, schema markup)
- Website maintenance and ongoing support

## Pages

- [Home](https://holtzdigital.com/): Overview of services, work samples, FAQ, and contact.
- [About](https://holtzdigital.com/about): Background on Darrin Holtz and the Holtz Digital approach.
- [Web Design Services](https://holtzdigital.com/web-design): Full breakdown of deliverables and scope.
- [Blog](https://holtzdigital.com/blog): Articles on web design, local SEO, and website performance for small businesses.
